subcodes.first_line: O Physician of souls! John the Baptist was a dignified and sedate physician. When he observed that the Israelites were overthrown [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب جانها یحیای حصور طبیب وقور بود چون ملاحظه نمود که اسراایلیان مقلوب
subcodes.subjects: @John the Baptist, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
